scripts.build: sass assets/theme.scss assets/theme.css --style=expanded --no-source-map && sass assets/page-templates.scss assets/page-templates.css --style=expanded --no-source-map && sass assets/portfolio-original.scss assets/portfolio-original.css --style=expanded --no-source-map && sass assets/portfolio-tailwind-compat.scss assets/portfolio-tailwind-compat.css --style=expanded --no-source-map
